name: tic-tac-toe-fixture
description: Design-artifact fixture for a simple client-side Tic-Tac-Toe application. Consumed by a code-generation agent to build the app. Contains NO implementation.

artifacts.purpose: Functional and non-functional requirements, assumptions, constraints, and acceptance criteria.
Definitions of core domain terms (Board, Cell, Turn, Player, Winner, Draw, Reset, Game State, Winning Combination).
User stories with acceptance criteria describing features from the player's perspective.
List of application routes (/ required, /about optional) and their purposes.
The application state machine: Idle, Playing, Winner, Draw, and Reset transitions.
Design tokens: colors, typography, spacing, border radius, board/cell sizing, buttons, shadows, transitions.
Coding guidelines for the implementation agent (React, naming, folders, hooks, state, CSS, a11y, formatting).
Desired React (Vite) project structure with per-file responsibilities.
Minimal backend structure (health endpoint only) with explicit non-goals.
All gameplay validation rules and per-move validation order.
Static, JavaScript-free semantic HTML mockup of the UI, styled from the design tokens.
This file. Enumerates every artifact with its purpose and dependencies.
Completion checklist verifying every artifact is present, complete, and cross-linked.
